scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:html
scripts.build:css: echo 'CSS already optimized' && cp -r assets/css dist/ 2>/dev/null || mkdir -p dist/assets/css && cp -r assets/css dist/assets/
scripts.build:html: echo 'HTML already optimized' && cp -r *.html docs legal assets dist/ 2>/dev/null || mkdir -p dist && cp -r *.html docs legal assets dist/ || true
scripts.dev: echo 'Static site - no dev server needed'
scripts.lint: echo 'No linting configured for static site'
scripts.test: echo 'No tests configured for static site'
